name: Bazooka
description: I think about this every time I hit the hooka

moves.name: Kaboom
moves.desc: The bazooka fires at the nearest granny within a 25 mile radius!

moves.name: Kabloom
moves.desc: The bazooka bounces towards the enemy and fires many times!

moves.name: Kablow
moves.desc: Finally, the bazooka bounces towards the enemy's granny and murks her for emotional damage!

moves.name: Kabam
moves.desc: The enemy becomes emotionally paralyzed and thinks about their granny everytime they hit the hooka!
